headline: Q1 Earnings Roundup: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) And The Rest Of The General Industrial Machinery Segment
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q1 general industrial machinery earnings season.
